title: All The Clients
description: "All the Clients" is a special modpack for Minecraft that was developed for the client so that it can be used on servers without mods. It offers a variety of improvements for players, especially on small vanilla servers.
body:
![ATC Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67f5494f65be40d83e45fffda579bd05908afae3.png)
# ✨ Modpack for Client-ONLY Mods ✨  
*Enhance your vanilla gameplay without changing the core experience!*

[![Discord – Support & Updates](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Support%20%26%20Updates-00f5ff?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/UExsEhN4dD)
![Client-Side Only](https://img.shields.io/badge/Client-Side_Only-7a3cff.svg)
![Vanilla Compatible](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vanilla_Compatible-00f5ff.svg)
![Performance Focus](https://img.shields.io/badge/Performance_Focus-7a3cff.svg)
![Fabric Edition](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric_Edition-WIP-00f5ff.svg)

---

## 🌍 The “All the Clients” Modpack
This pack was created to **optimise the Minecraft experience on vanilla servers** without altering the original gameplay.  
It’s a carefully curated collection of **client-side mods** aimed at performance improvements, useful information and small QoL tweaks – while keeping it **100% vanilla-compatible**.

Each mod has been **tested and reviewed** in singleplayer and on vanilla servers with friends. The selection focuses on **non-invasive improvements**, balancing performance, gameplay information and quality of life.

> Inspired by community projects like *CraftAttack*: more fun, more clarity, smoother gameplay – without breaking the vanilla spirit.

---

## ✅ Highlights
- 💨 **Performance**: smoother FPS, faster loads, lean client
- 🧭 **Info & UI**: optional overlays & clarity tools (no new blocks/items)
- 🧰 **Quality of Life**: tiny tweaks that respect vanilla balance
- 🔄 **Actively maintained**: updates & community feedback via Discord

---

## ⚠️ Known Issue & Migration
Some users on **NeoForge `1.25.8`** report **failed server joins**.  
We’re migrating to a **Fabric** build to avoid these issues and keep things stable.  
👉 Join the Discord for **hotfix notices & migration steps**:  
**https://discord.gg/UExsEhN4dD**

---

## 💬 Feedback
Your comments, suggestions and ideas are always welcome. I’m committed to **keeping the project updated** with new mods and versions.  
A **Fabric edition** is in the works. 🚀

**Discord (Support • Changelog • Votes):** https://discord.gg/UExsEhN4dD

— *Sakuto*
